subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Kinney et al, spoken on 1909-08-21
subcodes.first_line: The stars that we can see in the heavens are not one per cent of those that actually exist. Ignorant people imagine this to be the only world of existence, but there are many, very, very many world of existence, many more than we can see.
subcodes.subjects: @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @realms of being; three realms; five realms
